programme.title: Atashinchi
programme.desc: Mikan, Yuzuhiko and their parents navigate their daily lives while confronting various challenges. However, the Tachibana family is known for their clumsiness.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shinchan Special - Shinchan Chala Hawai
programme.desc: Shin-chan and family win a Hawaii trip, but he refuses to leave. The Noharas must convince their stubborn son it's time to go home.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Pokemon Movie: Darkrai Dost Ya Dushman
programme.desc: Darkrai, a shadowy Pokemon, comes to the rescue of a town that becomes the battleground of two powerful Pokemon, Dialga and Palkia.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Perman
programme.desc: Mitsuo Suwa, a clumsy boy, works as an apprentice for Birdman to become a powerful superhero, Perman, and rescues the victims of crime and disasters.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Hoping to change the future, a quirky robot cat travels back in time and offers a plethora of futuristic gadgets to solve a slow-witted boy's everyday problems.

programme.title: Munki and Trunk
programme.desc: Munki and Trunk live together in a jungle, as they embark on various adventures, exploring the world and making new friends.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Hoping to change the future, a quirky robot cat travels back in time and offers a plethora of futuristic gadgets to solve a slow-witted boy's everyday problems.

programme.title: Zootopia
programme.desc: Rookie officer Judy Hopps uncovers a dark conspiracy in Zootopia and teams up with a sly con artist. Together, they join forces to solve the case and prove her abilities.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Hoping to change the future, a quirky robot cat travels back in time and offers a plethora of futuristic gadgets to solve a slow-witted boy's everyday problems.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Hoping to change the future, a quirky robot cat travels back in time and offers a plethora of futuristic gadgets to solve a slow-witted boy's everyday problems.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Hoping to change the future, a quirky robot cat travels back in time and offers a plethora of futuristic gadgets to solve a slow-witted boy's everyday problems.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Miss katkar punishes popat and asks him to clean the store room due to the chaos caused. However, while cleaning the store room, he gets coated in red paint.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey Bunny and team are chilling outside when they see a bunch of people walking towards Khanna's house. Soon, they realise it is a party organised by Kitty for her friends.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Khanna and Miss Katkar bring kites for the gang as there is a kite festival. Soon, they decide to compete in flying kites.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey Bunny and others join Kitty when she decides to go on an adventurous surfing trip, however, they come across unexpected challenges.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae berates Shin-chan for his misdemeanours. However, later when Shin-chan drinks alcohol from the fridge by mistake, his behaviour changes.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Whilst Shin-chan and his friends are playing a detective game, they observe a handkerchief dropped by a woman and follow her to return it.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: The principal of the kindergarten tries to teach the children the art of calligraphy. However, Shin-chan creates a nuisance for everyone.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan is taking a bath, he begins to play with Misae's expensive toiletries and ends up wasting all of her body washes.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After stamping the seals on all of Misae's greeting cards for the New Year, Shin-chan ends up posting them in the wrong post box.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae and Shin-chan spend time together at home after Hiroshi leaves. However, when a neighbour visits them, Shin-chan tears Misae's dress.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan scribbles on a wall, he is caught in the act by a security guard. However, despite her attempts to keep him in her custody, he escapes.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After watching Misae cut a pair of pants short, Shin-chan impulsively ends up cutting all the clothes short when Misae steps out for a call.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After Shin-chan and his family watch a movie starring Kizakora, Shin-chan wins an opportunity to meet her and spend time with her.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Hiroshi informs his family that he will be away on a business trip for a month, Misae is shocked. However, she later wishes him good luck.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan wants to drink coffee and prepares it himself. However, he gets caffeinated and finds it difficult to fall asleep at night.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae and Hiroshi find fish eggs in the fridge and decide to eat them. However, despite enjoying their meal, they fall sick.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Since Masao and Nene-chan are preoccupied, Kazama and Shin-chan start playing with each other. Later, Kazama suggests that they try wrestling.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae takes Shin-chan on a shopping trip. However, on the way back, Shin-chan gifts a packet of chips to the owner of a small shop.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Crayon Shin-chan Spin-off: O-O-O-No Shinnosuke
programme.desc: Shinnosuke and the Nohara family awaken from cold sleep on a drifting space ship. Their cosmic journey unfolds as they navigate life and face challenges aboard the vessel.

programme.title: Crayon Shin-chan Spin-off: O-O-O-No Shinnosuke
programme.desc: Shinnosuke and the Nohara family awaken from cold sleep on a drifting space ship. Their cosmic journey unfolds as they navigate life and face challenges aboard the vessel.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Kalpvrisksh successfully turns Manav into a monkey. Later, Baalveer requires Pari's help to solve this problem.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Baalveer feels guilty, as Manav is cursed to be a monkey for life. An upset Baalveer is motivated by the angels to save Manav.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Baalveer lands in danger while saving the magical buds. Everyone in the Fairy Realm praises his bravery as he saves himself and others too.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Ballu is taken to a fairyland where he is blessed with special powers by six fairies, each having her own unique traits. He uses his powers to help good and honest children, including his friends.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal is awe-struck to find himself at his surprise birthday party organised by his colleagues and Gokuldham residents.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Members of the society continue their quest to track down Champaklal by sharing his photograph and following up on any leads.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal gets stuck in a tree while helping a child get a kite, leaving Tapu Sena and others to figure out how to rescue him without causing harm.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham members come together at the park to aid Champaklal and provide him with food, while Tapu and Gogi search for a method to assist him in getting down.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Champaklal gets stuck on a tree, the society members help him get down. However, things get tricky when he spots a snake on the tree.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bapuji gets stuck atop a tree and panic sets in when a snake crawls towards him. Alarmed, colony members rally together and attempt a risky rescue as danger escalates.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: DCP Chittrole reveals to the CID team that ACP Pradyuman is working undercover to solve a marriage bureau case. Later, the ACP tells the team how Jasmine was killed at the mill.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: A murder takes place in such a way that no one in the house gets alarmed. The next day in the morning, the family members learn about the death and inform the CID team about it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tries to decipher the meaning behind the thought written in Sanskrit. Meanwhile, Bagha brings good news for Jethalal in the morning.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds out that the profits of Gada Electronics have increased by fifty per cent over the past year. Meanwhile, Bagha rushes to meet Ba.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha gets worried as Bawri gets late for their date. He goes to Bawri's house to check on her but finds that her house is locked.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bawari's refusal to speak with Bagha leaves him disappointed. Later, Jethalal and Nattu Kaka hope to do something to cheer Bagha up.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is left anxious after he receives an order he might not be able to fulfil. Later, he considers seeking Taarak's help in finding a solution.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when Bagha runs away from home and cannot be reached on his phone. Elsewhere, Jethalal has concerns of his own as he struggles to finish his orders on time.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham Society are stunned when they witness Bagha's body language. Later, things get worse when he utters lines from popular movies.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A drunk Baaga runs riot across Gokuldham society as the society members try to contain him. Eventually, Baaga reaches the first floor and threatens to jump off the balcony.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As Bagha's reckless behaviour continues, Taarak and Anjali try to find a way for him to come downstairs.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: An intoxicated Bagha's conduct becomes a nuisance for the residents of Gokuldham. Later, everyone must get together to find a solution.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham Society's members recite poems during the Holi celebrations. The group of men set out to execute their plan.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Plotting revenge on Tapu Sena, Guddu hatches a plan to cause trouble during the Holi celebrations in Gokuldham Society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As Gokuldham Society joyfully celebrates Holi, Guddu and his group focus on Sonu, planning to put colour on her specifically.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Dr Hathi finds himself in trouble as the black marketers of medicines corner him and overhear his conversation with Popatlal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal disguises himself in a desperate effort to meet Dr Maalpani, but he is left baffled after finding out that Dr Maalpani has left.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After failing to perform a sting operation on the black marketers, Popatlal decides to give it another shot with Jethalal at the helm of the operation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal tells Jethalal that Rang Tarang Resort needs 200 TVs and refrigerators for its rooms. Jethalal becomes ecstatic at the prospect of getting this huge order.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: On Popatlal's insistence, Jethalal decides to leave for the resort as per their plan. He also takes Bagha and Champaklal along for support.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal sets off for the resort. Popatlal rings to enquire about his whereabouts, but the former plays a prank on him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As Popatlal and Bharti eagerly wait for Jethalal to touch down at the resort, they believe that a waiter is keeping an eye on them. Jethalal and Champaklal enjoy the journey to the resort.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finally arrives at the resort. Popatlal feels upset when he realises that Champaklal and Bagha have tagged along.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Madhvi scolds her daughter for being on the phone while they are looking for Bhide's screw. Champaklal scolds Jethalal when he starts bantering with Daya.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide wants to fix his broken glasses and avoids spending money, but Madhavi insists on him getting a new pair.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide almost drops his new glasses when the Tapu Sena are playing. However, when he finds his glasses broken later, he blames them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide gives the culprit the chance to come clean. However, Tapu has an alibi, and Jethalal is sure he is innocent.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is about to punish Tapu when Sonu confesses her mistake. Bhide is furious and heart-broken that Sonu is scared of him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham's men plan a secret New Year's party at Popatlal's house, but Champaklal ends up drinking by mistake.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gadas invite some members of the society to join their trip to Kutch. Jethalal is upset about Goli joining them without his permission.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham residents travel to Kutch and all are excited about the journey. Jethalal tries his best to find a seat next to Babita.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham residents reach Kutch and Jethalal and Champaklal share various information about the region. All are happy with the beauty of Kutch and arrangements made for Kutch Rann Utsav.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everybody gets up early in the morning to watch the beautiful sunrise and take a ride in the hot-air balloon before visiting the BSF camp.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everybody takes part in the aarti of Godess Aashapura Mata in Kutch and buy souvenirs for other Gokuldham members.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sunder's assistant comes with the construction equipment but problem arises when Dr Hathi falls into mud. Jethalal and Daya decide to buy a plot in Kutch and meet an agent.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide makes frequent calls to Jethalal and disturbs him while he is discussing details of the plot with the agent. The residents of Gokuldham wear traditional clothes worn by the people of Kutch.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sundar's assistant starts maintenance work in the society. Bhide informs the residents about the new safety rules to be followed during the process.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and the others arrive in Kutch and go to a local hotel to have lunch. Iyer is not happy with the sweet food, but Jethalal takes up the challenge to ensure that he enjoys the food.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While enjoying the camel ride with his family and friends, Jethalal's camel takes a different direction and he goes missing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The police and BSF try to investigate and find Jethalal. Daya becomes restless as the situation gets worse. Jethalal crosses the border and reaches Pakistan.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Pakistani officers interrogate Jethalal. Daya and the rest get news of Jethalal being held captive in Pakistan. Taarak calls up Sodhi and comes to know about Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya and the family pray for Jethalal's return. The Pakistani authorities decide to put Jethalal in jail. Jethalal answers Bollywood-related queries from other inmates.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: With no update on Jethalal's status, the BSF officer suggests that everyone return home. However, everyone is infuriated with the idea and refuses to budge.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal, Daya and Sodhi decide to go to Delhi and seek help from higher authorities. The residents back at Gokuldham worry about Jethalal's safe return.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Wagle Ki Duniya
programme.desc: Three generations of a middle-class family navigate the ups and downs of life and overcome their simple everyday struggles together.

programme.title: Pashminna
programme.desc: Pashmina's desire of a fairytale romance comes true when she finds herself falling for Raghav, unaware of the past that connects them.

programme.title: Dhruv Tara: Samay Sadi Se Pare
programme.desc: Princess Tara from the 17th century steps into the 21st century in search of a cure for her brother, where her fate intertwines with Dhruv, a doctor skilled in modern science.

programme.title: Vanshaj
programme.desc: Yuvika, a talented young woman, clashes with her family over the inheritance of the family business by male members and advocates for determining the successor based on their competence.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Wagle Ki Duniya
programme.desc: Three generations of a middle-class family navigate the ups and downs of life and overcome their simple everyday struggles together.

programme.title: Dhruv Tara: Samay Sadi Se Pare
programme.desc: Princess Tara from the 17th century steps into the 21st century in search of a cure for her brother, where her fate intertwines with Dhruv, a doctor skilled in modern science.

programme.title: Aangan Aapno Kaa
programme.desc: After raising three children alone, Jaidev Sharma weathers the storms of seeing his daughters marry.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.desc: Three generations of a middle-class family navigate the ups and downs of life and overcome their simple everyday struggles together.

programme.title: Vanshaj
programme.desc: Yuvika, a talented young woman, clashes with her family over the inheritance of the family business by male members and advocates for determining the successor based on their competence.
